title: myroxylon buxifolium
intro: Myroxylon buxifolium, also known as Palo Santo, is a tree species native to the dry forests of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Palo Santo include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory problems, and alleviating pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of Palo Santo include essential oils, capsules, and teas, which are used to promote relaxation, improve mood, and support overall well-being.
